query: SELECT n.id, n.user_id, n.title, n.message, n.is_read, n.created_at FROM notifications n JOIN users u ON n.user_id = u.id WHERE u.email = 'alejoile300@gmail.com' ORDER BY n.created_at DESC LIMIT 20;
